name: PEOPLES FINANCIAL CORP /MS/
business: Peoples Financial Corporation is a one-bank holding company headquartered in Biloxi, Mississippi. Its principal subsidiary, The Peoples Bank, provides a full range of banking, financial, and trust services to state, county, and local government entities, individuals, and small and commercial businesses. The company's trade area comprises portions of Mississippi, Louisiana, and Alabama within a fifty-mile radius of its three most outlying branches.
sellsTo: state, county, and local government entities
